title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 144.1021 - Effective date of certain sections
text:
144.1021.  Effective date of certain sections. — The enactment of sections 143.177, 144.608, 144.637, 144.638, and 144.752 of this act; the repeal and reenactment of sections 143.011, 144.011, 144.014, 144.020, 144.049, 144.054, 144.140, 144.526, and 144.605 of this act; and the repeal of sections 144.710, 144.1000, 144.1003, 144.1006, 144.1009, 144.1012, and 144.1015 of this act shall become effective January 1, 2023.
(L. 2021 S.B. 153 & 97 § B)
